Submit Update
Home/Templates

Templates

Make the next action easy to send.

Use these as plain starting copy for a business listing, event, grant path, nonprofit referral, gallery show, class, market, or mentorship program.

Mobile quick route

Use a template

Open the template or route that matches the ask: listing correction, event blurb, flyer packet, or outreach email.

DirectoryEvent postingVisitor channelsSubmit update

Directory listing request

Hello, I am requesting an update or listing for [business/program name]. We serve [audience] in [town/county]. Our current details are: [website], [phone], [address], [hours], [short description]. Please let me know if there is a preferred form or review process.

Event calendar submission

Event name: [name]. Date/time: [date]. Location: [place]. Cost: [free/price]. Who it is for: [audience]. Short description: [45-75 words]. Image/flyer attached. Contact: [name/email/phone].

Media pitch

[Organization] is launching [thing] for [audience] on [date]. It matters locally because [one concrete reason]. We can provide photos, a short interview, and event details. The public call to action is [register/visit/share/contact].

Promotion or advertising question

Hello, I am reaching out to ask whether [organization/publication/site name] accepts event listings, newsletter submissions, business directory updates, paid advertisements, social media co-promotion, visitor-guide listings, or other community announcements. The item is [business/event/program name] for [audience] in [town/county]. Could you point me to the right form, deadline, rate card, eligibility rule, or contact person?

Partner ask

We are trying to reach [audience] across [counties]. Would your organization be open to sharing [listing/event/resource], referring people who need it, or suggesting the best local channel? I can send a short blurb and image sized for your usual format.

Follow-up tracker

Track: date, channel, contact, message sent, response, next action, result, whether the source should be reused.

Next action

Choose the next practical route.

  • Find places to send outreach packets
  • Search directories and local leads
  • Submit a correction or new channel
  • Plan the outreach cycle first

Artist and gallery templates

Use specific outreach instead of generic promotion language.

Artist commission inquiry

Subject: Artist Available for [commission/signage/workshop/exhibition] in [town/county]

Hello [name],

I am a [medium/service] artist based in [town/county]. I am reaching out because [business/gallery/organization] may be a fit for [commissioned work, workshop, exhibition, vendor opportunity, or collaboration].

I can provide a portfolio link, short bio, sample images, price range or estimate process, availability, and installation or travel notes.

The useful next step would be [brief call / submission instructions / who to contact / whether this fits your current needs].

Thank you,
[name]
[contact]
[portfolio link]

Gallery submission question

Subject: Artist Submission Question â€” [artist name], [medium]

Hello [gallery/contact],

I am asking whether [gallery name] is currently accepting artist submissions, exhibition proposals, consignment inquiries, workshop proposals, or vendor recommendations.

My work is [one-sentence description]. I am based in [town/county] and can provide a short portfolio packet if submissions are open.

Could you point me to the preferred process, deadline, commission terms, or contact person?

Thank you,
[name]
[portfolio link]
[contact]

Event templates

Match the template to the event type.

Art opening calendar submission

Event: [title]
Date/time: [date and reception hours]
Location: [venue, address]
Artists: [names]
Description: [50 words]
Public action: Attend / RSVP / buy ticket / visit gallery
Image: [link or attached]
Accessibility notes: [parking, entrance, seating, etc.]
Contact: [name, email, phone]

Live music calendar submission

Event: [performer + venue]
Date/time: [date and set time]
Location: [venue, address]
Genre/format: [acoustic, band, open mic, etc.]
Cost: [free, suggested donation, ticket link]
Age limits: [all ages / 21+ / unknown]
Description: [50 words]
Image: [link or attached]
Contact: [name, email, phone]

Business launch listing

Subject: New Business Listing Request â€” [business name]

Hello [contact],

[business name] is opening or updating service in [town/county]. We serve [audience/customers] with [one-sentence offer].

Details:
- Address or service area:
- Hours:
- Website/contact:
- Opening date or active date:
- Public action: visit / call / book / request quote / register

Could you let me know whether this fits your directory, newsletter, calendar, visitor guide, or business-resource page?

Thank you,
[name]

Nonprofit templates

Lead with public benefit and save proof.

Nonprofit program listing request

Subject: Community Program Listing Request â€” [program name]

Hello [contact],

I am writing on behalf of [organization]. We are sharing a public program serving [audience] in [town/county].

Program:
[program name]

Public benefit:
[one sentence]

Date/time/location:
[details]

Public action:
[register / attend / refer / volunteer / donate / contact]

Could you let us know whether this fits your calendar, newsletter, community bulletin, partner list, or referral pathway?

Thank you,
[name]
[role]
[organization]
[contact]

Sponsor or partner follow-up

Subject: Follow-up and documentation for [program/event]

Hello [name],

Thank you for helping share or support [program/event]. We are collecting basic documentation for our board, funders, and future partners.

If available, could you send:
- link or screenshot of the listing/post
- approximate date shared
- any response, attendance, referral, or engagement notes

We will use this to document public reach and improve future outreach.

Thank you,
[name]
Back to top

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders so users can act without treating old details as final.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Open resource directory Submit a correction

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
